title: Cosmetic /faq/ CSS tweak to exercise v0.4 visual-diff and establish multi-viewport baselines
acceptance_criteria: site/src/pages/faq.astro (or a style it pulls in) gains a small, visually obvious cosmetic change — e.g. a heading color, accent background, border, or spacing bump — large enough to be unambiguously detectable in a PNG diff.
No content/copy on /faq/ is changed; the edit is style-only.
`npm run build` in site/ succeeds after the change.

New baseline PNGs exist at .cloverleaf/baselines/faq-mobile.png, .cloverleaf/baselines/faq-tablet.png, and .cloverleaf/baselines/faq-desktop.png, each captured from the post-change /faq/ route at the corresponding viewport.
The merge commit to main contains the CSS/markup change and all three baseline PNGs together as a single atomic changeset.
definition_of_done: The /faq/ cosmetic style change and the three new .cloverleaf/baselines/faq-{mobile,tablet,desktop}.png baseline PNGs are merged to main in one commit; the site build passes; only the /faq/ route's baselines are new/modified.
